header.note: The source node in most cases contains the sample message as written by the developer. If it looks like a dot-delimitted string such as "form.label.firstname", then the developer has not provided a default message.

trans-unit.resname: limitationValues contains invalid value '%value%'. Allowed value is '%allowed_value%'
trans-unit.source: limitationValues contains invalid value '%value%'. Allowed value is '%allowed_value%'
trans-unit.target: limitationValues contient une valeur non valide « %value% ». La valeur autorisée est « %allowed_value% ».
trans-unit.note: key: limitationValues contains invalid value '%value%'. Allowed value is '%allowed_value%'

trans-unit.resname: limitationValues['value'] has invalid value '%value%'. Allowed values are: '%allowed_values%'
trans-unit.source: limitationValues['value'] has invalid value '%value%'. Allowed values are: '%allowed_values%'
trans-unit.target: limitationValues['value'] contient une valeur non valide « %value% ». Les valeurs autorisées sont : « %allowed_values% ».
trans-unit.note: key: limitationValues['value'] has invalid value '%value%'. Allowed values are: '%allowed_values%'
